title: Henbrandt Large Jungle Stickers 180 Assorted Animal Zoo Safari Stickers Boys Girls Teachers School Reward Party Favours Scrapbook
features: These fun jungle animal stickers will appeal to boys and girls alike
Great clroom tool for teachers, scrapbooks, crafts, decoration, sticker boards and party favors
18 stickers per sheet, approx. 1 inch diameter
10 sheets per pack - 180 stickers in total
description: These large stickers feature a variety of different jungle animals on a green background. They are perfect well-made stickers for kids, making them an ideal teacher resource, and they are also great as jungle party favours, bag fillers, pinata rewards or for crafting, scrapbooking and organization. Each pack contains 10 sheets of assorted jungle/zoo animal stickers, including lions, tigers, elephants, hippos and monkeys. 18 stickers per sheet. Stickers measure 1 inch in diameter. 9 different designs Henbrandt Large Jungle Stickers 180 Assorted Animal Zoo Safari Stickers Boys Girls Teachers School Reward Party Favours Scrapbook
